description: Security Headers Configuration voor Cloudflare Pages

headers.name: Permissions-Policy
headers.value: geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=(), payment=(), usb=(), magnetometer=(), gyroscope=(), accelerometer=()

headers.name: Content-Security-Policy
headers.value: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; upgrade-insecure-requests;

instructions: Configureer deze headers in Cloudflare Dashboard > Pages > Your Project > Settings > Custom Headers
